title: SafeSquares
description: Beta 1.7.3 mod to highlight blocks that mobs can spawn on in the world. Inspired by Zombe's Modpack's 'safe' mod.
body:
# SafeSquares



SafeSquares is a mod for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 that adds a light-level overlay on top of blocks, in the style of
the "safe" mod from [Zombe's Modpack](<https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/mods-discussion/1403048-zombes-modpack-for-minecraft-1-6-1>).
When enabled with the hotkey (<kbd>L</kbd> by default), blocks that monsters can spawn on will be highlighted with a red 
cross, or a yellow cross if they can only spawn there during night. 

![Screenshot of Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 with the SafeSquares mod activated, showing an area of sunlit grass with a yellow 
cross overlay, indicating that monsters can spawn on those blocks at night; and a cave in the distance with a red cross 
overlay, indicating that monsters can spawn on those blocks at all times of day.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Lemmmy/SafeSquares/HEAD/images/demo1.png)

## Requirements

- Minecraft Beta 1.7.3
- [Babric](<https://babric.github.io/use/installer/>)
- [StationAPI](<https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi>)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](<https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin>)

## Recommended

- [Mod Menu Babric](<https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-babric>) (for in-game configuration)

## Configuration

The mod's keyboard shortcut (<kbd>L</kbd> by default) can be configured in the in-game Controls menu. All other settings
can be configured in-game (if [Mod Menu Babric](<https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-babric>) is installed) or in
`.minecraft/config/safesquares/safesquares.yml`.

## License

This mod and its source code is licensed under the MIT license. 

## Disclaimer

The source code from Zombe's Modpack was **not** used to develop this mod. AI tooling and large language models were
**not** used to develop this mod. AI-generated contributions will not be accepted.
